name: <OnAfdxPacket>
title: <OnAfdxPacket>
syntax: void <OnAfdxPacket>( long dir, long line, int64 timestamp, long bag, long afdxFlags, long packet );
description: This callback is called when a registered AFDX packet is received.

parameters.name: dir
parameters.description: Direction of the packet or fragment. 0: Rx 1: Tx

parameters.name: line
parameters.description: Line of the packet or fragment. 0: LineUndefined (e.g. for reassembled packets) 1: LineA 2: LineB 3: LineAB

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: Time stamp of the packet or fragment in ns.

parameters.name: bag
parameters.description: Time difference since last packet of this Virtual Link in ms.

parameters.name: status info
parameters.description: This packet was received from Line-B.

parameters.name: bit 3
parameters.description: This packet is from a SAP port.

parameters.name: error info
parameters.description: Packet was received in wrong interface (Line-A versus Line-B).

parameters.name: bit 5
parameters.description: Packet has an invalid Ethernet frame content.

parameters.name: bit 6
parameters.description: Packet has an invalid sequence number.

parameters.name: bit 7
parameters.description: Packet has a time-out on redundancy reception.

parameters.name: bit 8
parameters.description: Packet has encountered a fragmentation error.

parameters.name: bit 9
parameters.description: Packet has protocol errors on higher protocol level.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of the received packet or fragment.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
